accept: cmd/act/create.go flag default and help text both say 2.
Existing v0.1.0 issues already in the wild keep their priority (no migration); only new act create calls without -p get the new default.
Test asserting default priority is 2 in both internal/cli and cmd/act paths.
payload.description: Found by code reviewer 2026-05-10. internal/cli/create.go:136 uses priority:=1 default. cmd/act/create.go:33 declares the flag as fs.Int("priority", 1, "issue priority (0..3, default 1)"). Spec spec-v2.md:50 and :563 both say default is 2 (lower=more urgent, 0=highest). Affects act ready ordering: follow-ups filed without -p sort at p=1 alongside intentional p=1 work, instead of below it at p=2 like the spec implies. Both the code default and the --help text need updating.
payload.title: default priority is 1 in code; spec says 2
